testcase.name: test_page_formyformcomponents_visibility
testcase.failure: tests\page_7_181a\test_page_7_181a.py:21: in test_page_formyformcomponents_visibility expect(page.get_by_css("nav.navbar.navbar-expand-lg.bg-light").first).to_be_visible(timeout=15000) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Page' object has no attribute 'get_by_css'

testcase.name: test_page_link_formy_visibility

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible Actual value: None Error: element(s) not found Call log: - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator("#logo").first

testcase.failure: tests\page_7_181a\test_page_7_181a.py:26: in test_page_link_formy_visibility expect(page.locator("#logo").first).to_be_visible(timeout=15000) E AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible E Actual value: None E Error: element(s) not found E Call log: E - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms E - waiting for locator("#logo").first

testcase.name: test_page_heading_drag_the_image_into_the_box_visibility
testcase.failure: tests\page_7_181a\test_page_7_181a.py:31: in test_page_heading_drag_the_image_into_the_box_visibility expect(page.get_by_tag("h1").first).to_be_visible(timeout=15000) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Page' object has no attribute 'get_by_tag'

testcase.name: test_page_drop_here_element_visibility

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible Actual value: None Error: element(s) not found Call log: - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator("#box").first

testcase.failure: tests\page_7_181a\test_page_7_181a.py:36: in test_page_drop_here_element_visibility expect(page.locator("#box").first).to_be_visible(timeout=15000) E AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible E Actual value: None E Error: element(s) not found E Call log: E - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms E - waiting for locator("#box").first
